title: Tender Toasted Saudi Arabian Rigatoni Pasta
description: A lacto-vegetarian friendly Saudi Arabian dish featuring rigatoni, toasted to perfection on a yakimono grill and cooked on a tava griddle, this meal is perfect for a quick and delicious dinner.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the rigatoni according to package instructions until al dente.
While the rigatoni is cooking, heat the olive oil on the tava griddle over medium heat.
Add the garlic powder, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the tava griddle and stir for 1 minute.
Add the cooked rigatoni to the tava griddle and stir to combine with the spice mixture.
Transfer the rigatoni mixture to the yakimono grill and toast for 5 minutes.
Remove the rigatoni from the grill and top with grated mozzarella cheese.
Return the rigatoni to the grill and toast until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the rigatoni from the grill and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon juice.
Serve the tender toasted Saudi Arabian rigatoni pasta hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
